scripts.typecheck: if command -v compact >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm compact:check && tsc --noEmit; else echo 'nyxt-vault: compact CLI absent - skipping compile+typecheck (SC-024 CI gate is owner-gated; install the Compact toolchain in CI to enable)'; fi
scripts.test: if command -v compact >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm compact:check && vitest run; else echo 'nyxt-vault: compact CLI absent - skipping simulator suite (SC-024 CI gate is owner-gated; install the Compact toolchain in CI to enable)'; fi
